title: Resinous German Cornmeal Gratin
description: A quick and snappy German dish featuring cornmeal and yuzu-cure, perfect for a paleo-friendly meal, baked in individual mini cocottes.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the cornmeal, yuzu juice, coconut oil, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
In a separate bowl, whisk the eggs until they are lightly beaten.
Add the sliced onion and minced garlic to the egg mixture and stir until they are well combined.
Add the egg mixture to the cornmeal mixture and stir until a thick batter forms.
Divide the batter evenly among 4 individual mini cocottes.
Place the cocottes on a baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the gratin from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
